data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of booking completion within the Google interface, but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case describes the booking process occurring within Google, yet there is no direct evidence or API reads that demonstrate this functionality is operational or validated. The absence of evidence specifically addressing the completion of bookings within the Google interface indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that bookings are completed within the Google interface.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for Google interface booking completion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that bookings are completed within the Google interface and not redirected elsewhere.
